# ARC-QUIC-RFC9000-0003 - QUIC RFC 9000 Stateless Reset Versioning Architecture

## Purpose

Describe how the endpoint-owned version-profile snapshot keeps RFC 9000 Stateless Reset generation acceptable after connection-state loss.

## Requirements Satisfied

- REQ-QUIC-RFC9000-S10P3-0029
